introSection: Dragon in the Jungle is a steel launched roller coaster at Dragon Valley Theme Park in Pukou, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China. It opened in 2021.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Dragon in the Jungle is a Shockwave 1095m model manufactured by Vekoma.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders per train.

fullText:
Dragon in the Jungle is a steel launched roller coaster at Dragon Valley Theme Park in Pukou, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China. It opened in 2021.

Dragon in the Jungle is a Shockwave 1095m model manufactured by Vekoma.

2 trains with 4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders per train.
